Package io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.client

Class ClientConfigurationBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.client.ClientConfigurationBuilder
public class ClientConfigurationBuilder extends Object
A builder for Meilisearch ClientConfiguration.
Author:
Junghoon Ban
